# flags

**Instance Property**

The bitwise `OR` of zero or more key import/export flags.

## Declaration

```swift
var flags: SecKeyImportExportFlags
```

## Discussion

Use the values from [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeyImportExportFlags].
